headline: How The Story Around American International Group (AIG) Is Shifting With New Targets And Deals
summary: American International Group’s modeled fair value has been nudged from US$87.10 to US$87.20, a small move that still matters if you are tracking how sentiment is evolving around the name. That adjustment sits against a backdrop of research where bullish voices highlight earnings growth and capital flexibility, while more cautious analysts point to sector wide pressures and trim targets into the low to mid US$80s. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit together and what to...

headline: Genesis Announces Private Placement of $120,000
summary: Kelowna, British Columbia--(Newsfile Corp. - April 9, 2026) - Genesis AI Corp. (CSE: AIG) (OTCQB: AIGFF) (the "Company") is pleased to announce its non-brokered private placement (the "Offering") at a price of $0.06 per Unit for net proceeds of $120,000.Under the offering the Company will issue up to 2 million units. Each unit consists of one common share (each a "Common Share") and one common share purchase warrant (each warrant, a "Warrant"). Each Warrant entitles the holder thereof to acquire
